peace-sign-v1.note: Initial attempt — first 2 frames jumped to peace-sign before natural raise. Replaced by v2 (firstFramePoseId locked).

somersault-hero-landing.note: Forward flip → kneeling landing. v2 fixed the rotation axis (head-over-heels, not vertical pirouette). Landing holds in a head-bowed kneel rather than a textbook fist-on-ground Marvel pose — close enough for queued use; lock a last_frame_pose_id if a sharper hero-pose end is needed.

somersault-hero-landing-v1.note: Misfire — vertical-axis pirouette spin instead of head-over-heels front flip. Replaced by v2 with explicit horizontal-rotation-axis prompt.
